portfolio.banner.title: RYAN NGUYEN
portfolio.aboutme.name: ANIGA IGA WARAN
portfolio.aboutme.details: Iyada oo aan leeyahay 5 sano oo khibrad ah oo ah Horumariye Frontend (HTML, CSS, JS, ReactJS) iyo 3 sano oo dheeraad ah oo Horumarinta Backend, waxaan leeyahay xirfado adag oo isku xira labada dhinac ee horumarinta websaydhka.
portfolio.workexp.phase1.name: HORUMARIYE FRONTEND
portfolio.workexp.phase1.details.1: Ku xeel dheer MERN stack oo lagu helay mashaariic jaamacadeed oo toos ah.
portfolio.workexp.phase1.details.2: Horumariyay ablikeeshanada Web3 ee cusub iyada oo la adeegsanayo Solidity sidii Horumariye Full Stack ee mashaariicda ugu dambeeya.
portfolio.workexp.phase2.name: TABABBARKA
portfolio.workexp.phase2.details.2: Abuur frontend ee mashaariic badan oo dibadda ah oo adeegsanaya NextJS.
portfolio.workexp.phase2.details.3: Abuur server si aad u soo jiidato xogta blockchain-ka.
portfolio.workexp.phase3.name: HORUMARIYE BACKEND
portfolio.workexp.phase3.details.1: Hoggaamiyay horumarinta backend adeegsiga qaab dhismeedka ASP.NET ee mashruuc weyn oo saamayn leh, isaga oo hubinaya waxqabad adag iyo ballaarin.
portfolio.workexp.phase3.details.2: Naqshadeeyay oo hirgeliyay saldhigyada xogta SQL Server si loo hagaajiyo maaraynta xogta iyo dhammaystirnaanta.
portfolio.education.name: WAXBARASHADA
portfolio.education.phase1.place: Jaamacadda Sayniska iyo Teknolojiyada ee Hanoi
portfolio.education.phase1.title: SHAHAADADA KOOWAAD
portfolio.education.phase1.details.1: Ka qalin jabiyay shahaado heer sare ah oo Injineerinka Teknolojiyada Macluumaadka ah.
